title: Nobel Professional Stainless Steel German Mixing Bowls Set of 3
features: MULTI-FUNCTION Metal Bowls Set: 3 different sizes enable multiple ways of use. Kids’ snack storage, egg mixing, salad mixing, leftovers or on-the-go lunch, whatever you might come up with.
Complete Mixing Bowls Set Ideal for meal prep, food storage, or making pancakes, our 3-piece nesting mixing bowls adds convenience and versatility to your kitchen.
Nested or Stackable Storage When not in use these bowls nest inside one another to save cabinet space or stack on top of each other in a fridge to maximize storage.
Dishwasher Safe and Easy to Clean The perfect choice for your healthy meal prep plans or regular daily dinners, simply put them in the dishwasher when you’re done.
18cm Bowl Capacity - 1.5 Litres, 22cm Bowl Capacity - 2.5 Litres, 26 cm Bowl Capacity 4 Litres.
description: Product Description Nobel Professional Stainless Steel German Mixing Bowls Set A versatile set of stainless steel mixing bowls, perfect for all your kitchen needs. From meal prep to baking, these bowls offer convenience and durability. Nobel Professional Stainless Steel Mixing Bowls A versatile set of stainless steel mixing bowls perfect for all your kitchen needs. With three different sizes, these bowls are ideal for meal prep, baking, mixing, and even storage. Crafted with high-quality materials, they are durable and easy to clean. Versatile Stainless Steel Mixing Bowl Set A set of high-quality stainless steel mixing bowls in three sizes, perfect for various kitchen tasks like meal prep, baking, and storage. The bowls feature a sleek design with a contrasting matte brushed and mirror polished finish, wide rims, and flat bases for stability.
